summary: A figure sits on impossible stairs within an architectural paradox of arched doorways and interlocking planes, holding a burnt-orange document covered in annotations.

pairs.see: impossible staircase that simultaneously ascends and descends
pairs.represents: the recursive nature of peer review, dismantling arguments layer by layer

pairs.see: burnt-orange document held in the figure's hands
pairs.represents: the printed article covered in red marginal notes being scrutinized

pairs.see: interlocking arched doorways creating spatial paradox
pairs.represents: the methodological rigor required to identify flawed identification strategies

pairs.see: figure seated in contemplative pose within the geometric structure
pairs.represents: the reviewer perched on the edge of scrutiny, between amused and exasperated
